cohort_definition_id.cohort_definition_id: An identifier for the specific cohort definition used to classify subjects.

subject_id.subject_id: A unique identifier for the individual subject included in the cohort.

cohort_start_date.cohort_start_date: The date on which the subject entered the cohort.

cohort_end_date.cohort_end_date: The date on which the subject exited the cohort or the cohort observation period ended.

location_id.location_id: A unique identifier assigned to each location record.

address_1.address_1: The primary street address line for the location.

address_2.address_2: An optional secondary address line, such as suite or apartment number.

city.city: The city in which the location is situated.

state.state: The state or province abbreviation for the location.

zip.zip: The postal or ZIP code associated with the location.

county.county: The county name where the location resides.

location_source_value.location_source_value: The source system or provider from which the location data was obtained.

care_site_id.care_site_id: A unique identifier for a care site within the database.

care_site_name.care_site_name: The human-readable name of the care site.

place_of_service_concept_id.place_of_service_concept_id: A concept identifier that specifies the type of place of service for the care site.

location_id.location_id: An identifier linking the care site to its physical location record.

care_site_source_value.care_site_source_value: The original source value used to represent the care site in the data source.

place_of_service_source_value.place_of_service_source_value: The original source value used to represent the place of service in the data source.

id.id: A unique identifier for the care plan record.

start.start: The date and time when the care plan becomes active.

stop.stop: The date and time when the care plan is terminated or completed.

patient.patient: The identifier of the patient to whom the care plan applies.

encounter.encounter: The identifier of the clinical encounter during which the care plan was initiated.

code.code: A standardized code that categorizes the type or nature of the care plan.

description.description: A textual description providing details about the care plan.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A code indicating the clinical reason or justification for the care plan.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual explanation of the reason behind the care plan.

start.start: The timestamp indicating when the allergy event or record was first documented.

stop.stop: The timestamp indicating when the allergy event or record was last updated or concluded.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient associated with the allergy record.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the clinical encounter during which the allergy was noted.

code.code: The standardized code (e.g., ICD-10, SNOMED) representing the specific allergy.

description.description: A free-text description providing details about the allergy.

id.id: A unique identifier for each imaging study record.

date.date: The date on which the imaging study was performed.

patient.patient: The identifier for the patient who underwent the imaging study.

encounter.encounter: The identifier for the clinical encounter associated with the imaging study.

body site code.body site code: A standardized code representing the anatomical site that was imaged.

body site description.body site description: A textual description of the anatomical site imaged.

modality code.modality code: A code indicating the imaging modality used (e.g., CT, MRI, X-ray).

modality description.modality description: A textual description of the imaging modality employed.

sop code.sop code: The Service Object Pair (SOP) instance UID code identifying the specific imaging instance.

sop description.sop description: A textual description of the SOP instance for the imaging study.

domain_concept_id_1.domain_concept_id_1: The identifier of the first domain concept involved in the relationship.

fact_id_1.fact_id_1: The unique identifier of the first fact record that participates in the relationship.

domain_concept_id_2.domain_concept_id_2: The identifier of the second domain concept involved in the relationship.

fact_id_2.fact_id_2: The unique identifier of the second fact record that participates in the relationship.

relationship_concept_id.relationship_concept_id: The identifier of the concept that defines the type of relationship between the two fact records.

cohort_definition_id.cohort_definition_id: A unique numeric identifier that distinguishes each cohort definition record.

cohort_definition_name.cohort_definition_name: A human-readable title that succinctly describes the cohort being defined.

cohort_definition_description.cohort_definition_description: A detailed textual explanation of the cohort’s purpose, inclusion criteria, and any relevant context.

definition_type_concept_id.definition_type_concept_id: A concept identifier indicating the type or format of the cohort definition (e.g., SQL, CDM, or other specification).

cohort_definition_syntax.cohort_definition_syntax: The actual query or rule syntax that operationalizes the cohort definition, often expressed in SQL or a domain-specific language.

subject_concept_id.subject_concept_id: A concept identifier representing the primary subject or entity (such as a person or patient) to which the cohort definition applies.

cohort_initiation_date.cohort_initiation_date: The date on which the cohort definition was created or first activated in the system.

start.start: The timestamp indicating when the medical condition began for the patient.

stop.stop: The timestamp indicating when the medical condition ended or was resolved for the patient.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient experiencing the condition.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the specific clinical encounter during which the condition was recorded.

code.code: The standardized medical code (e.g., ICD-10) representing the diagnosed condition.

description.description: A textual description of the medical condition associated with the code.

date.date: The calendar date on which the immunization was administered.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient receiving the immunization.

encounter.encounter: The identifier of the clinical encounter during which the immunization was given.

code.code: The standardized code (e.g., CPT or ICD) representing the specific immunization administered.

description.description: A textual description of the immunization, such as the vaccine name or type.

cost.cost: The monetary amount charged for the immunization, expressed in the local currency.

person_id.person_id: A unique identifier for the individual in the database.

death_date.death_date: The calendar date on which the individual died.

death_datetime.death_datetime: The exact date and time of death, including time zone information if available.

death_type_concept_id.death_type_concept_id: A concept identifier indicating the type of death event (e.g., natural, accidental).

cause_concept_id.cause_concept_id: A concept identifier representing the underlying cause of death as coded in a standardized vocabulary.

cause_source_value.cause_source_value: The original text or code for the cause of death as entered by the source system.

cause_source_concept_id.cause_source_concept_id: The concept identifier that maps the source cause code to a standardized concept, if available.

id.id: A unique identifier for the encounter record.

start.start: The timestamp indicating when the encounter began.

stop.stop: The timestamp indicating when the encounter ended.

patient.patient: The identifier of the patient involved in the encounter.

provider.provider: The identifier of the healthcare provider who conducted the encounter.

encounterclass.encounterclass: The classification of the encounter type, such as inpatient, outpatient, or emergency.

code.code: A standardized medical code (e.g., ICD-10) associated with the encounter.

description.description: A textual description of the medical condition or service provided during the encounter.

cost.cost: The monetary amount charged for the encounter, expressed in the local currency.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A code representing the reason for the encounter, such as a diagnosis or complaint.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual explanation of the reason for the encounter.

cdm_source_name.cdm_source_name: The full name of the Common Data Model source database or dataset.

cdm_source_abbreviation.cdm_source_abbreviation: An abbreviated or short form of the cdm_source_name used for quick reference.

cdm_holder.cdm_holder: The organization or entity that owns or maintains the CDM source.

source_description.source_description: A textual description providing details about the source data, its purpose, and scope.

source_documentation_reference.source_documentation_reference: A reference to documentation or metadata that explains the source data structure and content.

cdm_etl_reference.cdm_etl_reference: Information about the ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) process used to populate the CDM from the source.

source_release_date.source_release_date: The date on which the source data was released or made available.

cdm_release_date.cdm_release_date: The date on which the CDM version was released.

cdm_version.cdm_version: The version identifier of the Common Data Model used for this source.

vocabulary_version.vocabulary_version: The version of the vocabulary (terminology) used within the CDM.

start.start: The date and time when the medication was first administered or prescribed.

stop.stop: The date and time when the medication administration or prescription ended.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient receiving the medication.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the clinical encounter or visit during which the medication was administered.

code.code: The standardized code representing the specific medication, such as an RxNorm or drug code.

description.description: A textual description of the medication, including its name and possibly dosage form.

cost.cost: The monetary amount charged for the medication, expressed in the local currency.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A standardized code indicating the clinical reason or indication for prescribing the medication.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual explanation of the clinical reason or indication for the medication.

observation_period_id.observation_period_id: A unique identifier for a specific observation period.

person_id.person_id: The identifier linking the observation period to a particular individual.

observation_period_start_date.observation_period_start_date: The date on which the observation period begins.

observation_period_end_date.observation_period_end_date: The date on which the observation period ends.

period_type_concept_id.period_type_concept_id: A concept identifier indicating the type or classification of the observation period.

id.id: A unique identifier assigned to each organization.

name.name: The official name of the organization.

address.address: The street address where the organization is located.

city.city: The city in which the organization operates.

state.state: The state or province where the organization is situated.

zip.zip: The postal code for the organization's location.

phone.phone: The primary telephone number for contacting the organization.

utilization.utilization: A metric indicating the level of resource or service usage by the organization.

condition_occurrence_id.condition_occurrence_id: A unique identifier for each recorded instance of a clinical condition.

person_id.person_id: The identifier linking the condition occurrence to the individual patient.

condition_concept_id.condition_concept_id: The OMOP concept ID that represents the clinical condition in the standardized vocabulary.

condition_start_date.condition_start_date: The calendar date on which the condition began.

condition_start_datetime.condition_start_datetime: The exact date and time when the condition onset was recorded.

condition_end_date.condition_end_date: The calendar date on which the condition ended or was resolved.

condition_end_datetime.condition_end_datetime: The exact date and time when the condition ended or was resolved.

condition_type_concept_id.condition_type_concept_id: The OMOP concept ID indicating how the condition was identified (e.g., diagnosis, procedure, lab result).

condition_status_concept_id.condition_status_concept_id: The OMOP concept ID indicating the current status of the condition (e.g., active, resolved).

stop_reason.stop_reason: A free-text explanation for why the condition was discontinued or resolved.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who recorded or confirmed the condition.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the visit during which the condition was recorded.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier of the detailed visit event, if applicable.

condition_source_value.condition_source_value: The original source code or value for the condition as entered in the data source.

condition_source_concept_id.condition_source_concept_id: The concept ID that maps the source value to the OMOP vocabulary.

condition_status_source_value.condition_status_source_value: The original source value indicating the status of the condition.

payer_plan_period_id.payer_plan_period_id: A unique identifier for a specific payer plan period record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier linking the record to a particular individual in the person table.

payer_plan_period_start_date.payer_plan_period_start_date: The date on which the payer plan period begins.

payer_plan_period_end_date.payer_plan_period_end_date: The date on which the payer plan period ends.

payer_source_value.payer_source_value: The code or name representing the payer (e.g., insurance company) associated with the plan period.

plan_source_value.plan_source_value: The code or name identifying the specific plan offered by the payer during the period.

family_source_value.family_source_value: The code or name indicating the family or group affiliation related to the plan period.

device_exposure_id.device_exposure_id: A unique identifier for each device exposure record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual who used or was exposed to the device.

device_concept_id.device_concept_id: The standard concept ID representing the type of device used, as defined in the vocabulary.

device_exposure_start_date.device_exposure_start_date: The calendar date when the device exposure began.

device_exposure_start_datetime.device_exposure_start_datetime: The exact date and time when the device exposure started.

device_exposure_end_date.device_exposure_end_date: The calendar date when the device exposure ended.

device_exposure_end_datetime.device_exposure_end_datetime: The exact date and time when the device exposure ended.

device_type_concept_id.device_type_concept_id: The concept ID indicating the category or type of device (e.g., medical device, diagnostic device).

unique_device_id.unique_device_id: A unique identifier for the specific device instance, such as a serial number.

quantity.quantity: The number of units of the device that were used during the exposure period.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who supplied or administered the device.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the visit during which the device exposure occurred.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier of a more detailed visit event related to the device exposure, if applicable.

device_source_value.device_source_value: The original source value or code for the device as recorded in the source system.

device_source_concept_id.device_source_concept_id: The concept ID that maps the source device code to the standard vocabulary.

date.date: The calendar date on which the observation was recorded.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient who underwent the observation.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the clinical encounter during which the observation was taken.

code.code: An alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies the type of observation, such as a LOINC or SNOMED code.

description.description: A human-readable description of the observation, providing context about what was measured or assessed.

value.value: The measured or recorded value of the observation, which may be numeric or textual.

units.units: The units of measurement associated with the observation value, such as mg/dL or mmHg.

type.type: The category or classification of the observation, indicating whether it is a vital sign, laboratory test, imaging result, etc.

id.id: A unique identifier assigned to each patient record.

deathdate.deathdate: The patient's date of death, if applicable.

prefix.prefix: The title or honorific preceding the patient's name (e.g., Mr., Ms., Dr.).

suffix.suffix: The suffix following the patient's name (e.g., Jr., III).

maiden.maiden: The patient's maiden name, if applicable.

birthplace.birthplace: The location where the patient was born.

city.city: The city component of the patient's address.

state.state: The state or province component of the patient's address.

zip.zip: The postal code of the patient's address.

drug_exposure_id.drug_exposure_id: A unique identifier for the drug exposure record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual who received the drug.

drug_concept_id.drug_concept_id: The standardized concept identifier for the drug as defined in the vocabulary.

drug_exposure_start_date.drug_exposure_start_date: The calendar date when the drug exposure began.

drug_exposure_start_datetime.drug_exposure_start_datetime: The exact date and time when the drug exposure started.

drug_exposure_end_date.drug_exposure_end_date: The calendar date when the drug exposure ended.

drug_exposure_end_datetime.drug_exposure_end_datetime: The exact date and time when the drug exposure ended.

verbatim_end_date.verbatim_end_date: The original end date recorded in the source data before standardization.

drug_type_concept_id.drug_type_concept_id: The concept identifier indicating the type of drug exposure (e.g., prescription, over-the-counter).

stop_reason.stop_reason: The reason why the drug exposure was discontinued, if known.

refills.refills: The number of refills authorized for the prescription.

quantity.quantity: The total quantity of the drug prescribed or dispensed.

days_supply.days_supply: The number of days the prescribed quantity is intended to cover.

sig.sig: The written instructions for how the drug should be taken.

route_concept_id.route_concept_id: The concept identifier for the route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous).

lot_number.lot_number: The batch or lot number of the drug product.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who prescribed or dispensed the drug.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the visit during which the drug exposure was recorded.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier of the detailed visit event associated with the drug exposure.

drug_source_value.drug_source_value: The original drug value as recorded in the source system.

drug_source_concept_id.drug_source_concept_id: The concept identifier derived from the source drug value.

route_source_value.route_source_value: The original route of administration value as recorded in the source system.

dose_unit_source_value.dose_unit_source_value: The unit of measure for the dose as recorded in the source data.

date.date: The calendar date on which the procedure was performed.

patient.patient: An identifier or name representing the patient who received the procedure.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the specific clinical encounter or visit during which the procedure took place.

code.code: The standardized medical code (e.g., CPT, ICD-10-PCS) that categorizes the procedure performed.

description.description: A textual description of the procedure corresponding to the code.

cost.cost: The monetary amount charged or billed for the procedure, typically in the local currency.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A standardized code indicating the clinical reason or indication for performing the procedure.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual explanation of the reason or indication associated with the procedure.

procedure_occurrence_id.procedure_occurrence_id: A unique identifier for each procedure record in the database.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the person who underwent the procedure.

procedure_concept_id.procedure_concept_id: The standardized concept ID representing the specific procedure performed.

procedure_date.procedure_date: The calendar date on which the procedure was performed.

procedure_datetime.procedure_datetime: The exact date and time when the procedure took place.

procedure_type_concept_id.procedure_type_concept_id: The concept ID indicating the type or context of the procedure (e.g., clinical, administrative).

modifier_concept_id.modifier_concept_id: The concept ID for any modifier applied to the procedure, such as laterality or severity.

quantity.quantity: The number of times the procedure was performed during the encounter.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the provider who performed or recorded the procedure.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the visit during which the procedure occurred.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier of the specific visit detail record, if applicable.

procedure_source_value.procedure_source_value: The original source value or code for the procedure as recorded in the source system.

procedure_source_concept_id.procedure_source_concept_id: The concept ID for the source value when it maps to a non-standard concept.

modifier_source_value.modifier_source_value: The original source value or code for the modifier applied to the procedure.

note_id.note_id: A unique identifier for each note record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the patient to whom the note belongs.

note_event_id.note_event_id: An identifier linking the note to a specific clinical event, such as a visit or procedure.

note_event_field_concept_id.note_event_field_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the specific field of the event that the note is associated with.

note_date.note_date: The calendar date on which the note was created or recorded.

note_datetime.note_datetime: The exact date and time when the note was entered into the system.

note_type_concept_id.note_type_concept_id: A concept ID that classifies the type of note, such as clinical, administrative, or patient-reported.

note_class_concept_id.note_class_concept_id: A concept ID that specifies the class of the note, for example progress note, discharge summary, or referral.

note_title.note_title: A brief title or heading summarizing the content of the note.

note_text.note_text: The full textual content of the note.

encoding_concept_id.encoding_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the coding system used to encode the note content, such as SNOMED or ICD-10.

language_concept_id.language_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the language in which the note is written.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who authored or entered the note.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the visit during which the note was recorded.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier of a specific visit detail or segment associated with the note, if applicable.

note_source_value.note_source_value: The original source system value or identifier for the note.

measurement_id.measurement_id: A unique identifier for the measurement record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the person who underwent the measurement.

measurement_concept_id.measurement_concept_id: The concept ID that specifies the type of measurement performed, such as blood pressure or glucose level.

measurement_date.measurement_date: The calendar date on which the measurement was taken.

measurement_datetime.measurement_datetime: The full date and time stamp indicating when the measurement was recorded.

measurement_time.measurement_time: The time of day at which the measurement was performed.

measurement_type_concept_id.measurement_type_concept_id: The concept ID indicating the category of the measurement, for example whether it is a vital sign, laboratory test, or observation.

operator_concept_id.operator_concept_id: The concept ID of the individual who performed or recorded the measurement, such as a nurse or technician.

value_as_number.value_as_number: The numeric result of the measurement, if applicable.

value_as_concept_id.value_as_concept_id: The concept ID representing a categorical value of the measurement, such as positive or negative.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: The concept ID of the unit in which the numeric value is expressed, such as mmHg or mg/dL.

range_low.range_low: The lower bound of the normal reference range for this measurement.

range_high.range_high: The upper bound of the normal reference range for this measurement.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who performed the measurement.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the visit during which the measurement was taken.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier of a specific visit detail or encounter segment related to the measurement.

measurement_source_value.measurement_source_value: The original source string value that identifies the measurement type.

measurement_source_concept_id.measurement_source_concept_id: The source concept ID corresponding to the measurement type as recorded in the source system.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The original source string value that identifies the unit of measurement.

value_source_value.value_source_value: The original source string value that represents the measurement result.

person_id.person_id: A unique identifier assigned to each individual in the database.

gender_concept_id.gender_concept_id: The standard concept ID representing the individual's gender, sourced from a controlled vocabulary.

year_of_birth.year_of_birth: The calendar year in which the individual was born.

month_of_birth.month_of_birth: The calendar month in which the individual was born.

day_of_birth.day_of_birth: The calendar day in which the individual was born.

birth_datetime.birth_datetime: The exact date and time of birth, recorded in a standardized datetime format.

death_datetime.death_datetime: The exact date and time of death, if applicable, recorded in a standardized datetime format.

race_concept_id.race_concept_id: The standard concept ID representing the individual's race, sourced from a controlled vocabulary.

ethnicity_concept_id.ethnicity_concept_id: The standard concept ID representing the individual's ethnicity, sourced from a controlled vocabulary.

location_id.location_id: A foreign key linking to the location table, indicating where the individual resides or was recorded.

provider_id.provider_id: A foreign key linking to the provider table, indicating the healthcare provider associated with the individual.

care_site_id.care_site_id: A foreign key linking to the care_site table, indicating the specific care site associated with the individual.

person_source_value.person_source_value: The original identifier for the individual as recorded in the source system.

gender_source_value.gender_source_value: The original gender value as recorded in the source system.

gender_source_concept_id.gender_source_concept_id: The concept ID corresponding to the original gender source value.

race_source_value.race_source_value: The original race value as recorded in the source system.

race_source_concept_id.race_source_concept_id: The concept ID corresponding to the original race source value.

ethnicity_source_value.ethnicity_source_value: The original ethnicity value as recorded in the source system.

ethnicity_source_concept_id.ethnicity_source_concept_id: The concept ID corresponding to the original ethnicity source value.

id.id: A unique identifier for each provider record.

organization.organization: The name of the organization or practice with which the provider is affiliated.

name.name: The full name of the healthcare provider.

gender.gender: The provider's gender, typically represented as a single character or full word.

speciality.speciality: The medical specialty or area of expertise of the provider.

address.address: The street address of the provider's office or practice location.

city.city: The city in which the provider's office is located.

state.state: The state or province where the provider's office is located.

zip.zip: The postal code for the provider's office location.

utilization.utilization: A metric indicating the provider's utilization rate or volume of services delivered.

provider_id.provider_id: A unique identifier assigned to each healthcare provider in the system.

provider_name.provider_name: The official name of the healthcare provider, typically the name of the individual or organization.

npi.npi: The National Provider Identifier, a unique 10-digit number assigned to health care providers in the United States.

dea.dea: The Drug Enforcement Administration registration number assigned to prescribers of controlled substances.

specialty_concept_id.specialty_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier representing the provider's medical specialty, aligned with a controlled vocabulary.

care_site_id.care_site_id: An identifier linking the provider to a specific care site or location within the health system.

year_of_birth.year_of_birth: The provider's year of birth, expressed as a four-digit year.

gender_concept_id.gender_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier indicating the provider's gender, based on a controlled vocabulary.

provider_source_value.provider_source_value: The original provider identifier value as recorded in the source system.

specialty_source_value.specialty_source_value: The original specialty description as recorded in the source system.

specialty_source_concept_id.specialty_source_concept_id: The concept identifier from the source system that corresponds to the provider's specialty.

gender_source_value.gender_source_value: The original gender value as recorded in the source system.

gender_source_concept_id.gender_source_concept_id: The concept identifier from the source system that corresponds to the provider's gender.

specimen_id.specimen_id: A unique identifier for each specimen record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier linking the specimen to the individual from the person table.

specimen_concept_id.specimen_concept_id: A standard vocabulary concept ID that specifies the type of specimen collected, such as blood or tissue.

specimen_type_concept_id.specimen_type_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the method or category of specimen collection, for example biopsy or aspirate.

specimen_date.specimen_date: The calendar date on which the specimen was collected.

specimen_datetime.specimen_datetime: The exact date and time when the specimen was collected, including time zone if available.

quantity.quantity: The numeric amount of specimen collected.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: A concept ID representing the unit of measurement for the quantity, such as milliliters or grams.

anatomic_site_concept_id.anatomic_site_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the anatomical location from which the specimen was obtained.

disease_status_concept_id.disease_status_concept_id: A concept ID describing the disease status of the specimen at the time of collection, such as malignant or benign.

specimen_source_id.specimen_source_id: The identifier used by the source system to reference this specimen.

specimen_source_value.specimen_source_value: The raw value from the source system that represents the specimen identifier.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The raw unit value from the source system used to describe the quantity measurement.

anatomic_site_source_value.anatomic_site_source_value: The raw value from the source system indicating the anatomical site of the specimen.

disease_status_source_value.disease_status_source_value: The raw value from the source system describing the disease status at collection.

observation_id.observation_id: A unique identifier for each observation record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual to whom the observation pertains.

observation_concept_id.observation_concept_id: The standardized concept ID representing the type of observation in the vocabulary.

observation_date.observation_date: The calendar date when the observation was recorded.

observation_datetime.observation_datetime: The exact date and time when the observation was recorded.

observation_type_concept_id.observation_type_concept_id: The concept ID indicating the source or method of the observation (e.g., clinical, laboratory, patient-reported).

value_as_number.value_as_number: The numeric value of the observation, if applicable.

value_as_string.value_as_string: The textual value of the observation, if applicable.

value_as_concept_id.value_as_concept_id: The concept ID representing the observation value when it is a coded concept.

qualifier_concept_id.qualifier_concept_id: The concept ID providing additional context or qualifier for the observation value.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: The concept ID specifying the unit of measurement for the observation value.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who recorded the observation.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the visit during which the observation was made.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier of the specific visit detail associated with the observation, if applicable.

observation_source_value.observation_source_value: The original source value or code for the observation as recorded in the source system.

observation_source_concept_id.observation_source_concept_id: The concept ID mapping the source observation code to the standardized vocabulary.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The original source unit value or code for the observation measurement.

qualifier_source_value.qualifier_source_value: The original source qualifier value or code for the observation.

observation_event_id.observation_event_id: The identifier linking the observation to a specific event record.

obs_event_field_concept_id.obs_event_field_concept_id: The concept ID indicating the type of field within the observation event.

value_as_datetime.value_as_datetime: The datetime value of the observation, if the observation is a date/time type.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: A unique identifier for each visit detail record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the person who experienced the visit, linking to the person table.

visit_detail_concept_id.visit_detail_concept_id: A concept ID from the standard vocabulary that defines the type of visit detail event.

visit_detail_start_date.visit_detail_start_date: The calendar date on which the visit detail began.

visit_detail_start_datetime.visit_detail_start_datetime: The exact date and time when the visit detail started, including time zone information.

visit_detail_end_date.visit_detail_end_date: The calendar date on which the visit detail concluded.

visit_detail_end_datetime.visit_detail_end_datetime: The exact date and time when the visit detail ended, including time zone information.

visit_detail_type_concept_id.visit_detail_type_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the classification of the visit detail, such as inpatient, outpatient, or emergency.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who delivered care during the visit detail.

care_site_id.care_site_id: The identifier of the care site (facility or location) where the visit detail occurred.

visit_detail_source_value.visit_detail_source_value: The original source value for the visit detail, as recorded in the source system.

visit_detail_source_concept_id.visit_detail_source_concept_id: The concept ID that maps the source value to a standardized concept.

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: The original source value indicating the location or facility from which the patient was admitted.

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: The concept ID that maps the admitted-from source value to a standardized concept.

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: The original source value indicating the destination or facility to which the patient was discharged.

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: The concept ID that maps the discharge-to source value to a standardized concept.

preceding_visit_detail_id.preceding_visit_detail_id: The identifier of the visit detail record that immediately preceded this one in the patient’s care sequence.

visit_detail_parent_id.visit_detail_parent_id: The identifier of the parent visit detail record, if this record is a sub-visit of a larger visit.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the associated visit occurrence that groups related visit detail records.
A unique identifier for a specific visit event.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual who experienced the visit.

visit_concept_id.visit_concept_id: A standardized concept ID that classifies the type of visit (e.g., inpatient, outpatient).

visit_start_date.visit_start_date: The calendar date on which the visit began.

visit_start_datetime.visit_start_datetime: The exact date and time when the visit started.

visit_end_date.visit_end_date: The calendar date on which the visit concluded.

visit_end_datetime.visit_end_datetime: The exact date and time when the visit ended.

visit_type_concept_id.visit_type_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the nature of the visit encounter (e.g., admission, emergency).

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who delivered care during the visit.

care_site_id.care_site_id: The identifier of the location or facility where the visit took place.

visit_source_value.visit_source_value: The original source code or value used to represent the visit type in the source system.

visit_source_concept_id.visit_source_concept_id: The concept ID that maps the source visit code to the standardized vocabulary.

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the source location or status from which the patient was admitted.

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: The original source value that represents the admission source.

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: A concept ID indicating the destination or status to which the patient was discharged.

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: The original source value that represents the discharge destination.

preceding_visit_occurrence_id.preceding_visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the visit that immediately preceded this visit, if applicable.
